Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.SemanticRetrieverConfig

  • Packages that use SemanticRetrieverConfig 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request
    Provides classes representing requests to the Gemini API.

    • Uses of SemanticRetrieverConfig in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Modifier and Type Method Description

      Optional.

      SemanticRetrieverConfig SemanticRetrieverConfig.setMinimumRelevanceScore​(Double minimumRelevanceScore)
      Optional.
      SemanticRetrieverConfig SemanticRetrieverConfig.setQuery​(Content query)
      Required.
      SemanticRetrieverConfig SemanticRetrieverConfig.setSource​(String source)
      Required.
